title: broadcast_to_group builds HashSet on every GROUP_SEND call
description: broadcast_to_group(state.rs:221) builds a HashSet<&str> from the member slice on every call. At 100 members this is invisible but the function also scans every live connected client in the DashMap. At 10K connected clients and 100-member groups the DashMap scan is O(10K) per GROUP_SEND. This is already noted in the comment. No immediate fix needed -- document expected scale ceiling explicitly in a comment so it is clear when to address it.
